description: Inherited thrombophilia risk-genotype panel: Factor V Leiden (rs6025) and Prothrombin G20210A (rs1799963). Both are minus-strand cross-vendor pitfalls (23andMe reports rs6025 on the minus strand) — calls are strand-harmonized. Relative VTE risk is always paired with absolute context. EXPANSION_STRATEGY.md §6 / roadmap #24.

genotype_models.risk_classification: Factor V Leiden + Prothrombin G20210A double homozygous
genotype_models.odds_ratio: Homozygous at both loci — among the highest-risk inherited thrombophilia genotypes. Homozygous Factor V Leiden alone carries roughly OR 5.6 (95% CI 4.6–6.7; up to ~11× in some pooled analyses) and homozygous Prothrombin G20210A roughly OR 5–7× for venous thromboembolism vs non-carriers, so the combined genotype is greater still
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: Even so, this genotype is rare and most carriers still do not have a clot in the absence of a trigger — in international case series roughly half remained event-free into their mid-30s. Absolute risk concentrates around estrogen-containing contraception/HRT, pregnancy and the postpartum period, major surgery, and prolonged immobility. Asymptomatic carriers are not automatically anticoagulated and population screening is not recommended, but specialist haematology input is reasonable.
genotype_models.finding_text: You carry two copies of both Factor V Leiden (rs6025) and Prothrombin G20210A (rs1799963) ({genotype}) — a double-homozygous inherited thrombophilia. {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk} Discuss thrombosis prevention around high-risk situations with a clinician.

genotype_models.risk_classification: Factor V Leiden homozygous + Prothrombin G20210A carrier
genotype_models.odds_ratio: Homozygous Factor V Leiden alone carries roughly OR 5.6 (95% CI 4.6–6.7; up to ~11× in some pooled analyses) for venous thromboembolism vs non-carriers, and an added Prothrombin G20210A copy compounds it further — among the higher-risk hereditary thrombophilia genotypes
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: This compound genotype is rare, and even so most carriers do not have a clot in the absence of a trigger. Absolute risk concentrates around estrogen-containing contraception/HRT, pregnancy and the postpartum period, major surgery, and prolonged immobility. Asymptomatic carriers are not routinely anticoagulated, and population screening is not recommended.
genotype_models.finding_text: You carry two copies of Factor V Leiden (rs6025) plus one Prothrombin G20210A (rs1799963) copy ({genotype}) — homozygous Factor V Leiden with an added prothrombin risk allele. {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk} Discuss thrombosis prevention around high-risk situations with a clinician.

genotype_models.risk_classification: Prothrombin G20210A homozygous + Factor V Leiden carrier
genotype_models.odds_ratio: Homozygous Prothrombin G20210A alone carries roughly OR 5–7× for venous thromboembolism vs non-carriers, and an added Factor V Leiden copy compounds it further — among the higher-risk hereditary thrombophilia genotypes
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: This compound genotype is rare, and even so most carriers do not have a clot in the absence of a trigger. Absolute risk concentrates around estrogen-containing contraception/HRT, pregnancy and the postpartum period, major surgery, and prolonged immobility. Asymptomatic carriers are not routinely anticoagulated, and population screening is not recommended.
genotype_models.finding_text: You carry two copies of Prothrombin G20210A (rs1799963) plus one Factor V Leiden (rs6025) copy ({genotype}) — homozygous prothrombin with an added Factor V Leiden risk allele. {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk} Discuss thrombosis prevention around high-risk situations with a clinician.

genotype_models.risk_classification: Factor V Leiden + Prothrombin G20210A (double carrier)
genotype_models.odds_ratio: OR 5.24 (95% CI 4.01–6.84; N=938,355) for venous thromboembolism vs non-carriers
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: Even so, most double carriers never have a clot. Absolute risk is concentrated around transient triggers — estrogen-containing contraception/HRT, pregnancy and the postpartum period, major surgery, and prolonged immobility. Asymptomatic carriers are not anticoagulated, and population screening is not recommended.
genotype_models.finding_text: You carry one copy each of Factor V Leiden (rs6025) and Prothrombin G20210A (rs1799963) ({genotype}) — double heterozygous. {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk} Discuss thrombosis prevention around high-risk situations with a clinician.

genotype_models.odds_ratio: Homozygous Factor V Leiden carries a substantially higher relative VTE risk than the ~3–5× of heterozygotes
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: Absolute lifetime risk is still moderate and concentrated around hormonal exposure, pregnancy/postpartum, surgery, and immobility. Asymptomatic carriers are not routinely anticoagulated; population screening is not recommended.
genotype_models.finding_text: Factor V Leiden homozygous (rs6025 {genotype}). {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk} Discuss thrombosis prevention around high-risk situations with a clinician.

genotype_models.odds_ratio: ~3–5× relative risk of venous thromboembolism vs non-carriers
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: Only about 10% of Factor V Leiden heterozygotes ever have a venous clot. Risk concentrates around estrogen-containing contraception/HRT, pregnancy/postpartum, surgery, and immobility. Asymptomatic carriers are not anticoagulated, and population screening is not recommended.
genotype_models.finding_text: Factor V Leiden heterozygous (rs6025 {genotype}) — you carry one copy. {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk}

genotype_models.odds_ratio: Homozygous Prothrombin G20210A carries a higher relative VTE risk than the ~2–3× of heterozygotes
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: Absolute risk remains modest and trigger-dependent (hormones, pregnancy/postpartum, surgery, immobility). Asymptomatic carriers are not routinely anticoagulated; population screening is not recommended.

genotype_models.odds_ratio: ~2–3× relative risk of venous thromboembolism vs non-carriers
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: Most carriers never clot. Risk concentrates around estrogen exposure, pregnancy/postpartum, surgery, and immobility. Asymptomatic carriers are not anticoagulated, and population screening is not recommended.
genotype_models.finding_text: Prothrombin G20210A heterozygous (rs1799963 {genotype}) — you carry one copy. {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk}
